subject: Problem with adding multiple data sources into one M population
body:
Dear all,
Hi, I'm trying to use M for final refinement, but having a problem with M.

I used multiple data collection sessions with different gain reference and 
exposure settings. I've done warp preprocessing on those separate 
directories which on same hard disk. Now I need to adding multiple data 
sources into one M population, which I created just one level up of the 
warp preprocessing directories, the first directory for data source worked 
fine, but for the other ones, I get the error message as: 
7/12/2020 10:56:10 PM:
System.IO.DirectoryNotFoundException: Could not find a part of the path 
'H:\SPA_N0_1126\matching'....
I've attached full crash history in this question.

I tried several times, like save another settings file by warp, all got 
this error message.
Anyone got a clue how to solve this problem?

Thank you very much in advance!

Yours sincerely,
Linhua Tai

7/12/2020 10:56:10 PM:
System.IO.DirectoryNotFoundException: Could not find a part of the path 'H:\SPA_N0_1126\matching'.
   at System.IO.__Error.WinIOError(Int32 errorCode, String maybeFullPath)
   at System.IO.FileSystemEnumerableIterator`1.CommonInit()
   at System.IO.FileSystemEnumerableIterator`1..ctor(String path, String originalUserPath, String searchPattern, SearchOption searchOption, SearchResultHandler`1 resultHandler, Boolean checkHost)
   at System.IO.Directory.EnumerateFiles(String path, String searchPattern)
   at M.Controls.Sociology.Dialogs.DialogDataSources.<ButtonAddLocal_OnClick>d__7.MoveNext() in D:\Dev\warp2\M\Controls\Sociology\Dialogs\DialogDataSources.xaml.cs:line 376
--- End of stack trace from previous location where exception was thrown ---
   at System.Runtime.ExceptionServices.ExceptionDispatchInfo.Throw()
   at System.Windows.Threading.ExceptionWrapper.InternalRealCall(Delegate callback, Object args, Int32 numArgs)
   at System.Windows.Threading.ExceptionWrapper.TryCatchWhen(Object source, Delegate callback, Object args, Int32 numArgs, Delegate catchHandler)
   at System.IO.__Error.WinIOError(Int32 errorCode, String maybeFullPath)
   at System.IO.FileSystemEnumerableIterator`1.CommonInit()
   at System.IO.FileSystemEnumerableIterator`1..ctor(String path, String originalUserPath, String searchPattern, SearchOption searchOption, SearchResultHandler`1 resultHandler, Boolean checkHost)
   at System.IO.Directory.EnumerateFiles(String path, String searchPattern)
   at M.Controls.Sociology.Dialogs.DialogDataSources.<ButtonAddLocal_OnClick>d__7.MoveNext() in D:\Dev\warp2\M\Controls\Sociology\Dialogs\DialogDataSources.xaml.cs:line 376
--- End of stack trace from previous location where exception was thrown ---
   at System.Runtime.ExceptionServices.ExceptionDispatchInfo.Throw()
   at System.Windows.Threading.ExceptionWrapper.InternalRealCall(Delegate callback, Object args, Int32 numArgs)
   at System.Windows.Threading.ExceptionWrapper.TryCatchWhen(Object source, Delegate callback, Object args, Int32 numArgs, Delegate catchHandler)
